> for (cores in 1:availCores) {
+   message(sprintf("Testing with %d cores ...", cores))
+   options(mc.cores = cores)
+ 
+   for (type in c("list", "environment", "listenv")) {
+     message(sprintf("Type of object: %s", type))
+ 
+     for (strategy in supportedStrategies(cores)) {
+       message("Type of future: ", strategy)
+       plan(strategy)
+ 
+       for (dim in dims) {
+         message("Dimensions: ", deparse(dim))
+ 
+         if (type == "list") {
+           x <- list()
+         } else if (type == "listenv") {
+           x <- listenv()
+         } else if (type == "environment") {
+           x <- new.env()
+         }
+ 
+         x$a <- 1
+         x$b <- future(2)
+         x$c <- future(NULL)
+         if (type != "list") x$d %<-% { 4 }
+         if (type != "environment") x[[6]] <- 6
+         str(x)
+ 
+         if (!is.null(dim)) {
+           if (type != "environment") {
+             names <- names(x)
+             dim(x) <- dim
+             dimnames(x) <- lapply(dim, FUN = function(n) letters[1:n])
+             names(x) <- names
+           }
+         }
+ 
+         f <- futures(x)
+         str(f)
+         if (type != "environment") {
+           stopifnot(length(f) == length(x))
+           stopifnot(identical(names(f), names(x)))
+         }
+         stopifnot(identical(dim(f), dim(x)))
+         stopifnot(identical(dimnames(f), dimnames(x)))
+ 
+         r <- resolved(x)
+         str(r)
+         if (type != "environment") {
+           stopifnot(length(r) == length(x))
+           stopifnot(identical(names(r), names(x)))
+         }
+         stopifnot(identical(dim(r), dim(x)))
+         stopifnot(identical(dimnames(r), dimnames(x)))
+ 
+         v <- value(x)
+         str(v)
+         if (type != "environment") {
+           stopifnot(length(v) == length(x))

+         }
+         stopifnot(identical(dim(v), dim(x)))
+         stopifnot(identical(dimnames(v), dimnames(x)))
+       } # for (dim ...)
+     } # for (strategy ...)
+ 
+     message(sprintf("*** futures() - %s ... DONE", type))
+   } # for (type ...)
+ 
+   message(sprintf("Testing with %d cores ... DONE", cores))

[09:37:54.506]                   }
[09:37:54.506]                 }

[09:37:54.506]                     {

[09:37:54.506]                       invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart

[09:37:54.506]                       muffled <- FALSE

[09:37:54.506]                         if (muffled)

[09:37:54.506]                       }

[09:37:54.506]                         if (muffled)

[09:37:54.506]                           computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts

[09:37:54.506]                             if (is.null(name)) 
[09:37:54.506]                               next
[09:37:54.506]                             if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:37:54.506]                               next
[09:37:54.506]                             invokeRestart(restart)
[09:37:54.506]                             muffled <- TRUE
[09:37:54.506]                             break
[09:37:54.506]                           }
[09:37:54.506]                         }
[09:37:54.506]                       }
[09:37:54.506]                       invisible(muffled)
[09:37:54.506]                     }
[09:37:54.506]                     muffleCondition(cond, pattern = "^muffle")
[09:37:54.506]                   }
[09:37:54.506]                 }

[09:37:55.368]                     }

[09:37:55.368]                           if (is.null(name)) 
[09:37:55.368]                             next
[09:37:55.368]                           if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:37:55.368]                             next

[09:37:55.368]                           muffled <- TRUE
[09:37:55.368]                           break

[09:37:55.368]                       }
[09:37:55.368]                     }
[09:37:55.368]                     invisible(muffled)

[09:37:56.295]                           if (is.null(name)) 
[09:37:56.295]                             next
[09:37:56.295]                           if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:37:56.295]                             next

[09:37:56.417]                   name <- changed[[kk]]

[09:37:56.417]                 }

[09:37:56.417]                     next

[09:37:56.417]                 }

[09:37:56.728]                             muffled <- TRUE
[09:37:56.728]                             break
[09:37:56.728]                           }
[09:37:56.728]                         }
[09:37:56.728]                       }
[09:37:56.728]                       invisible(muffled)
[09:37:56.728]                     }
[09:37:56.728]                     muffleCondition(cond, pattern = "^muffle")
[09:37:56.728]                   }
[09:37:56.728]                 }
[09:37:56.728]                 else {
[09:37:56.728]                   if (TRUE) {
[09:37:56.728]                     muffleCondition <- function (cond, pattern = "^muffle") 
[09:37:56.728]                     {
[09:37:56.728]                       inherits <- base::inherits
[09:37:56.728]                       invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:37:56.728]                       is.null <- base::is.null
[09:37:56.728]                       muffled <- FALSE
[09:37:56.728]                       if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:37:56.728]                         muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:37:56.728]                         if (muffled) 
[09:37:56.728]                           invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:37:56.728]                       }
[09:37:56.728]                       else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:37:56.728]                         muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:37:56.728]                         if (muffled) 
[09:37:56.728]                           invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:37:56.728]                       }
[09:37:56.728]                       else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:37:56.728]                         if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:37:56.728]                           computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts
[09:37:56.728]                           grepl <- base::grepl
[09:37:56.728]                           restarts <- computeRestarts(cond)
[09:37:56.728]                           for (restart in restarts) {
[09:37:56.728]                             name <- restart$name
[09:37:56.728]                             if (is.null(name)) 
[09:37:56.728]                               next
[09:37:56.728]                             if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:37:56.728]                               next
[09:37:56.728]                             invokeRestart(restart)
[09:37:56.728]                             muffled <- TRUE
[09:37:56.728]                             break
[09:37:56.728]                           }
[09:37:56.728]                         }
[09:37:56.728]                       }
[09:37:56.728]                       invisible(muffled)
[09:37:56.728]                     }
[09:37:56.728]                     muffleCondition(cond, pattern = "^muffle")
[09:37:56.728]                   }
[09:37:56.728]                 }

[09:37:56.728]         }))

[09:37:56.849]                 removed <- setdiff(old_names, names)
[09:37:56.849]                 changed <- common[...future.oldEnvVars[common] != 
[09:37:56.849]                   envs[common]]
[09:37:56.849]                 NAMES <- toupper(changed)
[09:37:56.849]                 args <- list()
[09:37:56.849]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:37:56.849]                   name <- changed[[kk]]
[09:37:56.849]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:37:56.849]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:37:56.849]                     next
[09:37:56.849]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:37:56.849]                 }
[09:37:56.849]                 NAMES <- toupper(added)
[09:37:56.849]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:37:56.849]                   name <- added[[kk]]
[09:37:56.849]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:37:56.849]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:37:56.849]                     next
[09:37:56.849]                   args[[name]] <- ""
[09:37:56.849]                 }
[09:37:56.849]                 NAMES <- toupper(removed)
[09:37:56.849]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:37:56.849]                   name <- removed[[kk]]
[09:37:56.849]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:37:56.849]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:37:56.849]                     next
[09:37:56.849]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:37:56.849]                 }
[09:37:56.849]                 if (length(args) > 0)

[09:37:56.849]                 args <- names <- old_names <- NAMES <- envs <- common <- added <- removed <- NULL
[09:37:56.849]             }

[09:37:57.052]                   muffleCondition <- function (cond, pattern = "^muffle") 
[09:37:57.052]                   {
[09:37:57.052]                     inherits <- base::inherits
[09:37:57.052]                     invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:37:57.052]                     is.null <- base::is.null
[09:37:57.052]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:37:57.052]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:37:57.052]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:37:57.052]                       if (muffled) 
[09:37:57.052]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:37:57.052]                     }
[09:37:57.052]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:37:57.052]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:37:57.052]                       if (muffled) 
[09:37:57.052]                         invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:37:57.052]                     }
[09:37:57.052]                     else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:37:57.052]                       if (!is.null(pattern)) {

[09:37:57.996]                   sendCondition(cond)
[09:37:57.996]                   muffleCondition <- function (cond, pattern = "^muffle") 
[09:37:57.996]                   {
[09:37:57.996]                     inherits <- base::inherits
[09:37:57.996]                     invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:37:57.996]                     is.null <- base::is.null
[09:37:57.996]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:37:57.996]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:37:57.996]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:37:57.996]                       if (muffled) 
[09:37:57.996]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:37:57.996]                     }
[09:37:57.996]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:37:57.996]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:37:57.996]                       if (muffled) 
[09:37:57.996]                         invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:37:57.996]                     }
[09:37:57.996]                     else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:37:57.996]                       if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:37:57.996]                         computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts
[09:37:57.996]                         grepl <- base::grepl
[09:37:57.996]                         restarts <- computeRestarts(cond)
[09:37:57.996]                         for (restart in restarts) {
[09:37:57.996]                           name <- restart$name
[09:37:57.996]                           if (is.null(name)) 
[09:37:57.996]                             next
[09:37:57.996]                           if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:37:57.996]                             next
[09:37:57.996]                           invokeRestart(restart)
[09:37:57.996]                           muffled <- TRUE
[09:37:57.996]                           break

[09:37:58.172]                         }

[09:37:58.172]                       invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart

[09:37:58.172]                         if (muffled)

[09:37:58.172]                       }

[09:37:58.172]                         if (muffled)

[09:37:58.172]                               next

[09:37:58.172]                               next
[09:37:58.172]                             invokeRestart(restart)

[09:37:58.172]                             break

[09:37:58.172]                       }

[09:37:58.386]                   muffleCondition <- function (cond, pattern = "^muffle") 
[09:37:58.386]                   {
[09:37:58.386]                     inherits <- base::inherits
[09:37:58.386]                     invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:37:58.386]                     is.null <- base::is.null
[09:37:58.386]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:37:58.386]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:37:58.386]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:37:58.386]                       if (muffled) 
[09:37:58.386]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:37:58.386]                     }
[09:37:58.386]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:37:58.386]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:37:58.386]                       if (muffled) 
[09:37:58.386]                         invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:37:58.386]                     }
[09:37:58.386]                     else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:37:58.386]                       if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:37:58.386]                         computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts
[09:37:58.386]                         grepl <- base::grepl

[09:37:58.522]                   muffleCondition <- function (cond, pattern = "^muffle") 
[09:37:58.522]                   {
[09:37:58.522]                     inherits <- base::inherits
[09:37:58.522]                     invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:37:58.522]                     is.null <- base::is.null
[09:37:58.522]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:37:58.522]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:37:58.522]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:37:58.522]                       if (muffled) 
[09:37:58.522]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:37:58.522]                     }
[09:37:58.522]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:37:58.522]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:37:58.522]                       if (muffled) 
[09:37:58.522]                         invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:37:58.522]                     }
[09:37:58.522]                     else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:37:58.522]                       if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:37:58.522]                         computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts
[09:37:58.522]                         grepl <- base::grepl
[09:37:58.522]                         restarts <- computeRestarts(cond)
[09:37:58.522]                         for (restart in restarts) {
[09:37:58.522]                           name <- restart$name
[09:37:58.522]                           if (is.null(name)) 
[09:37:58.522]                             next
[09:37:58.522]                           if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:37:58.522]                             next
[09:37:58.522]                           invokeRestart(restart)
[09:37:58.522]                           muffled <- TRUE
[09:37:58.522]                           break
[09:37:58.522]                         }
[09:37:58.522]                       }
[09:37:58.522]                     }
[09:37:58.522]                     invisible(muffled)
[09:37:58.522]                   }
[09:37:58.522]                   muffleCondition(cond)
[09:37:58.522]                 })
[09:37:58.522]             }))

[09:37:58.945]                   {
[09:37:58.945]                     inherits <- base::inherits
[09:37:58.945]                     invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:37:58.945]                     is.null <- base::is.null
[09:37:58.945]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:37:58.945]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:37:58.945]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:37:58.945]                       if (muffled) 
[09:37:58.945]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:37:58.945]                     }
[09:37:58.945]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:37:58.945]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:37:58.945]                       if (muffled) 
[09:37:58.945]                         invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:37:58.945]                     }
[09:37:58.945]                     else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:37:58.945]                       if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:37:58.945]                         computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts
[09:37:58.945]                         grepl <- base::grepl
[09:37:58.945]                         restarts <- computeRestarts(cond)
[09:37:58.945]                         for (restart in restarts) {
[09:37:58.945]                           name <- restart$name
[09:37:58.945]                           if (is.null(name)) 
[09:37:58.945]                             next
[09:37:58.945]                           if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:37:58.945]                             next
[09:37:58.945]                           invokeRestart(restart)
[09:37:58.945]                           muffled <- TRUE
[09:37:58.945]                           break
[09:37:58.945]                         }
[09:37:58.945]                       }
[09:37:58.945]                     }
[09:37:58.945]                     invisible(muffled)
[09:37:58.945]                   }
[09:37:58.945]                   muffleCondition(cond)
[09:37:58.945]                 })
[09:37:58.945]             }))

[09:37:59.657]                 }

[09:37:59.679]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:37:59.679]                 }
[09:37:59.679]                 NAMES <- toupper(added)
[09:37:59.679]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:37:59.679]                   name <- added[[kk]]
[09:37:59.679]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:37:59.679]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:37:59.679]                     next
[09:37:59.679]                   args[[name]] <- ""
[09:37:59.679]                 }
[09:37:59.679]                 NAMES <- toupper(removed)
[09:37:59.679]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:37:59.679]                   name <- removed[[kk]]
[09:37:59.679]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:37:59.679]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:37:59.679]                     next
[09:37:59.679]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:37:59.679]                 }
[09:37:59.679]                 if (length(args) > 0) 
[09:37:59.679]                   base::do.call(base::Sys.setenv, args = args)
[09:37:59.679]                 args <- names <- old_names <- NAMES <- envs <- common <- added <- removed <- NULL
[09:37:59.679]             }
[09:37:59.679]             else {
[09:37:59.679]                 base::do.call(base::Sys.setenv, args = base::as.list(...future.oldEnvVars))
[09:37:59.679]             }
[09:37:59.679]             {
[09:37:59.679]                 if (base::length(...future.futureOptionsAdded) > 
[09:37:59.679]                   0L) {
[09:37:59.679]                   opts <- base::vector("list", length = base::length(...future.futureOptionsAdded))
[09:37:59.679]                   base::names(opts) <- ...future.futureOptionsAdded
[09:37:59.679]                   base::options(opts)
[09:37:59.679]                 }

[09:37:59.679]                     NULL
[09:37:59.679]                   }

[09:38:00.060]                   {

[09:38:00.060]                     invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:38:00.060]                     is.null <- base::is.null
[09:38:00.060]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:38:00.060]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:38:00.060]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:38:00.060]                       if (muffled) 
[09:38:00.060]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:38:00.060]                     }
[09:38:00.060]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:38:00.060]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:38:00.060]                       if (muffled) 
[09:38:00.060]                         invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:38:00.060]                     }
[09:38:00.060]                     else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:38:00.060]                       if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:38:00.060]                         computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts
[09:38:00.060]                         grepl <- base::grepl
[09:38:00.060]                         restarts <- computeRestarts(cond)
[09:38:00.060]                         for (restart in restarts) {
[09:38:00.060]                           name <- restart$name
[09:38:00.060]                           if (is.null(name)) 
[09:38:00.060]                             next
[09:38:00.060]                           if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:38:00.060]                             next
[09:38:00.060]                           invokeRestart(restart)
[09:38:00.060]                           muffled <- TRUE
[09:38:00.060]                           break
[09:38:00.060]                         }
[09:38:00.060]                       }
[09:38:00.060]                     }
[09:38:00.060]                     invisible(muffled)
[09:38:00.060]                   }

[09:38:00.060]                 })
